description: Triggers when the user wants to create comparison pages, 'X vs Y' pages, 'alternatives to X' pages, or category roundup pages targeting competitive intent keywords
should_trigger: Create a Notion vs Confluence comparison page optimized for SEO
Build an 'alternatives to Slack' page for my team collaboration tool
Generate a 'best project management tools 2026' roundup page
I want a competitor comparison page targeting '[Product] vs [MyProduct]' keywords
Create a feature matrix comparison table showing my tool vs 4 competitors
How do I write a vs page that converts while being fair to competitors?
Build a comparison page targeting 'HubSpot alternatives' for my CRM
should_not_trigger: Write a blog post about best practices in project management
Create programmatic location pages for my local business
Implement schema markup on my product page
